what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for a design-assets image, specifically a PNG icon named Icon_ConceptV_VCircle_Yellow (2). It stores metadata such as the blob reference, channel, path, MIME type, reported dimensions, version, authorship session, timestamps, and an empty alt text and links list.
observations: The asset is an image/png with a blob://b2 reference.
Reported width and height are both 0.
created and updated timestamps are identical.
alt text is empty and links list is empty.
The file body after the frontmatter is empty.
standouts: An image asset record with zero width and height.
Empty alt text and empty links on a cataloged icon.
Name includes a '(2)' suffix suggesting a duplicate or iterated concept.

Follows the schema with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, versions, author_session, created, updated.
Names the file by flattening the channel/path/name into a slug.
concerns: Width and height are 0, which may indicate missing image analysis or extraction.

notes: A channel-memory ledger stub for a yellow V-circle concept icon PNG, with placeholder dimensions and no alt text or links.

purpose_vs_actual: The file is meant to catalog a versioned design-assets image, but it currently records only minimal metadata with zero dimensions and empty descriptive fields, so it acts as an incomplete catalog entry.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register a specific icon asset in a stable, addressable ledger so it can be referenced by blob, channel, and path, with authorship and versioning preserved.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable metadata record for a specific icon asset, including a blob reference, channel/path identity, and authorship/provenance, which a fused system can use to locate and version the referenced image.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory ledger markdown file describing a design-assets PNG icon named Icon_ConceptV_VCircle_Yellow (2) with a blob reference, zero dimensions, version 1, empty alt text, and no links.
